item.title: The 443rd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2024 ep 3
item.description:
HAPPY PRIDE MONTH! FUCK THESE COMPANIES IN PARTICULAR!
Bus Racists
If only
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
GAY SE[BIRD]
So gay
There is ONE hetero explanation for it: Daphne, not having much meat on her bones, was far too cold in that lingerie to sleep. Velma felt that she could sleep comfortably in Daphne's outfit, and offered to switch 'fits with her BEST FRIEND so they could both sleep comfortably. You can even see the start and end of the conversation: "It is SO COLD tonight! There's no way I can get to sleep in just this teddy!" ... "Yeah, I could be comfortable in this. At least for one night." But it's probably something gay.
Fuck all ads in particular
[ BRICK INTENSIFIES ]
Me when I see a really hot guy
THE WATERFALLS ARE TURNING THE SKY GAY!
@ElbowDeepInAHorse
Yes
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He also made me one where the Chonk (me) is holding a Progress Pride flag and a Bi Pride flag. That will be featured at the end of next week's dumps. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Sometimes its feels awful being alone
item.description: That includes sex. My last boyfriend cheated on me after 3 years of being together. I was devastated when I found it out. Depression takes. I start drinking and trying to drown your sorrows with alcohol for 10 years takes it tall. Im 36 now. I dont know what I achieve saying this but it feels good and you have to start somewhere to get it all together. Sorry for bad English and grammar. Not native. Edit: Thank you everyone for kind words. Happy pride moth everyone
item.dc:creator: coffeecleric

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
just give them a printout?
unhinged
i don't see any pizza but i'm in
i should do this more often
ah, the feral child (from Mad Max: The Road Warrior)
once again i've been attacked. i did steal a lot of memes though
i liked this meme when it was just a Big Lebowski reference and now Kirk makes it even better
when is solstice?
mmm hmm
i have questions
love me a good steamy png
alright alright alright
not sure how this is news
sneaky
my apologies
also gonna ask my friend who just smoked with me if I smell like weed
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Some Good News For A Change: Diamond Industry Tanking
item.description: Man-made diamonds continue to diminish the industry. Couldn't happen to a more deserving group of market manipulating assholes like DeBeers. Fuck 'em. Sauce: https://www.cnbc.com/2024/06/05/diamond-industry-in-trouble-as-lab-grown-gemstones-tank-prices-further.html#:~:text=Dwindling%20diamond%20demand&text=The%20end%20of%20pandemic%20restrictions,all%2Dtime%20high%20in%202022.
item.dc:creator: dashriproc1

item.title: Go Vote!
item.description:
2024 is a mega election year and the EU elections are taking place this week. This is the 2nd largest election in the world - around 350 million people are eligible to vote. Just like the elections in India and the USA this year - this one is very important for coexistence on our planet. Therefore, we want to use our reach and call on all those who are entitled to vote to make their voice heard.
We must not leave the EU to the far-right parties and must defend our democracies. Please vote.
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: The Landlady saved James Bond
item.description: Martial artist and actress Yuen Qiu (b. 1950) was Nara, one of two young women who rescue James Bond (Roger Moore) in The Man with the Golden Gun (1974, uncredited). Yuen left the industry in 1985 but her film and TV career was reignited after she portrayed the Landlady in the great Kung Fu Hustle (2004)
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: A UK homeowner took pics of the Fox cub that decided to move into their garden. They named it "Riko"
item.description: Evidently they have foxes visit every year to have a litter of cubs under their deck, but this time they left behind one of the cubs. Riko was checked out by wildlife rescue who deemed him healthy and safe to continue as he is. The cub comes and goes as it pleases to hunt and fend for itself, but chooses to come back to stay at the user's backyard. Source: https://www.reddit.com/user/HereToStealTheSnacks/
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Images of Note:The Seeker
item.description:
This is basically what cats are like when talking with people who love cats and those who hate them.
Ever notice how "Pro life" people are totally okay with kids going hungry and dying in school shootings?
post this on twitter to get banned on twitter (which to be honest is a good thing now).
The future is weird.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii I have made Furry Art. Yes you read that right.
hell yeah
The story as to why there were leather daddies in cartoons in the 90s is actually interesting and it involves a gay Finn serving in World War 2 and 50's Muscle Mags.
Consider: Southrogen.
Yeah...
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Stay Yaypilled.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Cakeday Dump
item.description:
It's my 6th Imgur anniversary. Figured I owed y'all a dump. (Pictured: CYPRESSALESH. Check out her content!)
As a trans, bisexual disaster, this place has been a common source of comfort for me. A lot of you embraced my coming out post 18 months ago - and now I'm genuinely living a life I'm happy to live. Progress is possible.
Expect heavy themes of LGBTQIA+ representation in this dump. Also some dumbassery. A cakeday dump should reflect the dumper, wouldn't you agree?
Gonna get this quote tattooed on my leg one day. Along with a million other things.
Going on hormones explicitly to become someone's deluxe wife is praxis, right?
The transfemme experience.
I have become the gay trans aunt to my best friends' 6 year old daughter, and the warmth that fills me when she admires my skirts or gives me a hand-made bracelet is beyond words. Yes, I wear that bracelet every day. Won't ever have kids of my own, but if that girl ever needs anything, I'll be there for her in a heartbeat.
Our bodies are incidental. Parts are replacable. Embrace queer transhumanism.
If God had wanted me to be straight, he wouldn't have made women so pretty.
Anyone else wish they were a moth? No? Just me? Okay...
Follow your dreams, boys and girls.
Brisket, my beloved.
I feel like every queer couple looks like this to some degree. And we love to see it.
Anyone wanna "sit under a shaded tree" with me? ?
Trans rights are human rights.
This pride month, remember that the first Pride was a riot.
Across from where I work is an automechanic. There's a girl who works there, who wears her jumpsuit down around her waist, and a tank top underneath. Sometimes, I catch a climpse of her out of the office window. Those are the good days.
Only twenty bucks for a whole cogan! Accept no substitutes!
This is me, btw. If you care.
This is either a great representation of LGBTQIA communities, or a D&D 5E stat block waiting to happen.
When did we stop having drip like this?
I own zero maid costumes, but several pairs of tall hooker heels and BSM fetish gear. Also, my room is a mess. Sometimes, the stereotypes are true.
Happy pride moth everyone!
My sex life in a nutshell.
Also my sex life in a nutshell.
ALSO my sex life in a nutshell!
Look, I'm as gay as the next girl, but I appreciate a nice hog, you know? People keep saying the penis is an unaesthetic piece of anatomy. I feel like they just don't appreciate how much fun you can have playing with one. Anyway, if you've got a sizable salami, you gotta share it with the world. Them's the rules.
Every geriatric man owes it to himself to feel submissive and breedable at least once in his life.
A huge part of reclaiming my body has been modifying it. Tattoos, piercings, nail polish, makeup-- they are tools of liberation. We are all pieces of art. And you don't have to ever leave your canvas blank.
If this isn't a queer 'zine yet, it needs to be.
Love yourself, and each other. You literally can't afford not to, besties.
YES
Un Jour Je Serai de Retour Prés de Toi
Inside every goth queen is a tired baked potato in need of snuggles. It's me. I mean me.
Hnnnggggg--
Trans culture is re-learning gender socialization at 30, and speedrunning your blunder years in a handful of months. Makeup is HARD, y'all!
Gay, trans, AND communist? It's more likely than you might think!
Sharing a bed with someone is therapy. Men, remember to touch and hug your male friends. Women show physical affection so easily, and it is a GAME CHANGER for mental stability!
No gays in history, only friends. No trans in history, only sexual deviants. No autists in history, only weirdos.
Imagine the friction of these babies on your wang! Phwoar!
Cats were made to be annoyed, and to annoy us. This is the foundation of our relationship with them. That's it. My cakeday dump is concluded. Exit through the gift shop.
item.dc:creator: brisketdotcom

Me attempting to do #gardening

Hahahaha
Basically China and the seas are it for Middle jurassic deposits
Something is wrong with my soup.
Hahahahahahahhahahaha
Heyyyyo @TinyRavenFeathers
Stupid Sexy Cazadore.
GOOD NEWS EVERYONE. Bad news: anyone who goes to this holy land can't drink coffee OR alcohol.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Where we goin'? Good boy! Boy! I love you too. Pippin?"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Is it possible to see anything cuter?
item.dc:creator: IssesMissPiggy

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description:
The lil man came home today! The vets called throughout the day with updates about Panko. They said he had started to eat some food and had perked up a lot more after the surgery. He did have pretty bad diarrhoea apparently and they had to give him a bucket bath to clean him up. Panko has a slight dank smell to him at the moment but that’s ok. He has a fentanyl patch on his leg which will stay there until Friday to help manage the pain. I think it is making him a bit like this tho O_O he’s pretty spaced out and sometimes will be just standing and staring off for ages. Otherwise everything seems to be going well! Panko has had a couple of small tail wags so I know he must be feeling so so much better. We take the bandage off his tummy tomorrow so we can monitor it visually to make sure it doesn’t get inflamed/infected.
The evil rock! They let me keep it.
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Even though this car is tiny, I am proud of it!
item.description: It’s my first car and got it 3 months ago. Even though it is small it’s not a big deal cause I’m not a tall person anyways and I’m short. I still have to sit close up to the steering wheel.

item.title: Sorry for breaking the selfie rule
item.description: I recently shared some weight loss progress pics and got some overwhelmingly positive responses so I wanted to share another. In the picture on the left I was 360+ lbs. I had to go to a special closet that had 3XL scrub tops or cram in to 2X when I couldn’t find any. Now I’m 205 and fit in to an L top and M pants. I swear I’m not as unhappy as I look in the picture!
item.dc:creator: ShotGlassFullOfRanchDressing
